---
title: "ERE Quarterly Infographic Brief"
---

```{r}
#| label: load-ere-data

# Set default fallback parameters for running code interactively during
# development since Quarto params are only passed when rendering the document
if (
  !exists(
    "params"
  )
) {
  params <- list(
    start_date = "2026-01-01",
    end_date = "2026-03-31",
    fiscal_system = "state"
  )
}

params$start_date <- lubridate::ymd(
  params$start_date
)
params$end_date <- lubridate::ymd(
  params$end_date
)

# Load ETL output
source(
  "R/load_data.R"
)

# Run the function to load complex care data
ere_data <- load_ere_data()

# Build subsets
ere_subsets <- build_subsets(
  full_data = ere_data$ere_data$ere_full_data,
  start_date = params$start_date,
  end_date   = params$end_date,
  fiscal_system = params$fiscal_system
)

ere_initiated  <- ere_subsets$initiated_within_period
ere_dismissed  <- ere_subsets$dismissed_within_period
```
